name: Destination Vulnerable to Detected Exploit
notes: Rule detects an attack against a vulnerable local destination, where the host is known to exist, and the host is vulnerable to the attack.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Exploit, Potential Exploit
when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when the destination is vulnerable to current exploit on current port
TD_list: APPLY Destination Vulnerable to Detected Exploit on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Exploit, Potential Exploit
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when the destination is vulnerable to current exploit on current port
RED_list: Event name: Destination Vulnerable to Detected Exploit
Event description: Rule detects an attack against a vulnerable local destination, where the destination is known to exist, and the host is vulnerable to the attack.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
Add "qidNumber" to Reference Map Of Sets: "CorrelatedAttackMap" with key "destinationIP"
